mapper.delete:
delete from dynamic_topic_ship where dtsId in
#{dtsId}
delete from dynamic_topic_ship where dynamicId = #{dynamicId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select topicId, topicName from dynamic_topic_ship where dynamicId = #{dynamicId, jdbcType=BIGINT}

select dy.dynamicId, dy.publishId, ui.nickname, ui.headImgUrl, dy.content, dy.publishImgUrl, dy.socialGroupId, case when dy.socialGroupId is null then 0 when dy.socialGroupId=0 then 0 else 1 end as moreFlag, (select sg.groupName from store_group sg where sg.storeGroupId=dy.socialGroupId) as groupName, dy.readCount, dy.dzCount, dy.plCount, (select count(1) from dz_record dr where dr.dynamicId=dy.dynamicId and dr.dzUserId=#{userId}) as dzStatus, (select ua.attentionStatus from user_attention ua where ua.attentedId = dy.publishId and ua.observerId = #{userId}) as attentionStatus, date_format(dy.publishDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as publishDate from dynamic_topic_ship dts inner join dynamic dy on dy.dynamicId = dts.dynamicId inner join user_info ui on ui.userId = dy.publishId where dts.topicId = #{topicId} AND dy.dynamicId NOT IN (SELECT ds.dynamicId FROM dynamic_shield ds WHERE ds.userId=#{userId}) order by dts.createdDate desc limit #{offset},#{limit}

select count(*) from dynamic_topic_ship dts inner join dynamic dy on dy.dynamicId = dts.dynamicId inner join user_info ui on ui.userId = dy.publishId where dts.topicId = #{topicId} AND dy.dynamicId NOT IN (SELECT ds.dynamicId FROM dynamic_shield ds WHERE ds.userId=#{userId})
